info.title: Re-review accepted cancel retry path (@general subagent)

parts.text: /review Verify fix for retry-path accepted cancel behavior in workspace-deployment-runner.ts: ensure we do not prematurely mark cancelled and no blocker remains for this path. Blocking issues only.

1466: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1467:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1468:   if (!claimed) {
1469:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1470:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1471:       try {
1472:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1473:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1474:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1475:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1476:         }
1477:       }
1478:       return;
1479:     }
1480: 
1481:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1482:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1483:       return;
1484:     }
1485: 
1486:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1487:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1488:         if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1489:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_stale');
1490:           return;
1491:         }
1492:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1493:           workspaceId,
1494:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1495:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1496:         });
1497:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1498:           workspaceId,
1499:           deploymentId,
1500:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1501:           payload: {
1502:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1503:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1504:           },
1505:         });
1506:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1507:           deploymentId,
1508:           status: 'failed',
1509:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1510:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1511:         });
1512:         return;
1513:       }
1514: 
1515:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1516:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1517:       }
1518: 
1519:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
1520:     }
1521:     return;
1522:   }
1523: 
1524:   try {
1525:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
1526:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
1527:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1528:         workspaceId,
1529:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1530:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1531:       });
1532:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1533:         workspaceId,
1534:         deploymentId,
1535:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1536:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
1537:       });
1538:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1539:         deploymentId,
1540:         status: 'failed',
1541:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1542:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1543:       });
1544:       return;
1545:     }
1546: 
1547:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1548:   } catch (error) {
1549:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1550:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
1551:       try {
1552:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1553:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1554:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1555:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1556:         }
1557:       }
1558:       return;
1559:     }
1560: 
1561:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1562:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1563:       return;
1564:     }
1565: 
1566:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
1567:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1568:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1569:         true
1570:       );
1571:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1572: 
1573:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1574:         workspaceId,
1575:         errorCode: error.code,
1576:         errorMessage: error.message,
1577:         result: { rollback },
1578:       });
1579:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1580:         workspaceId,
1581:         deploymentId,
1582:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1583:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
1584:       });
1585:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1586:         deploymentId,
1587:         status: 'failed',
1588:         errorCode: error.code,
1589:         errorMessage: error.message,
1590:       });
1591:       return;
1592:     }
1593: 
1594:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1595:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
1596:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
1597:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1598:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1599:         let shouldCancelLocally = true;
1600:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1601:         const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1602: 
1603:         if (latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1604:           try {
1605:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1606:             const cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1607:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1608:               workspaceId,
1609:               deploymentId,
1610:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1611:               payload: {
1612:                 providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1613:                 accepted: cancel.accepted,
1614:                 retryPath: true,
1615:               },
1616:             });
1617:             if (cancel.accepted) {
1618:               await env.DB
1619:                 .prepare(
1620:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1621:                    SET cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1622:                        updated_at = ?
1623:                    WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running'`
1624:                 )
1625:                 .bind(new Date().toISOString(), deploymentId, workspaceId)
1626:                 .run();
1627:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1628:             } else {
1629:               await env.DB
1630:                 .prepare(
1631:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1632:                    SET cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1633:                        updated_at = ?
1634:                    WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running'`
1635:                 )
1636:                 .bind(new Date().toISOString(), deploymentId, workspaceId)
1637:                 .run();
1638:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1639:             }
1640:           } catch (providerCancelError) {
1641:             if (providerCancelError instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1642:               throw providerCancelError;
1643:             }
1644:             const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1645:             if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1646:               throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1647:             }
1648:             throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1649:           }
1650:         }
1651: 
1652:         if (shouldCancelLocally) {
1653:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1654:           return;
1655:         }
1656:       }
1657: 
1658:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1659:         workspaceId,
1660:         startedAt: null,
1661:         finishedAt: null,
1662:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1663:         errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1664:       });
1665:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1666:         workspaceId,
1667:         deploymentId,
1668:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1669:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },
1670:       });
1671:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
1672:     }
1673: 
1674:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1675:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1676:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1677:       true
1678:     );
1679:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1680: 
1681:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1682:       workspaceId,
1683:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1684:       errorMessage: message,
1685:       result: { rollback },
1686:     });
1687:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1688:       workspaceId,
1689:       deploymentId,
1690:       eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1691:       payload: {
1692:         code: 'deployment_failed',
1693:         message,
1694:         rollback,
1695:       },
1696:     });
1697:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1698:       deploymentId,
1699:       status: 'failed',
1700:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1701:       errorMessage: message,
1702:     });
1703:   }
1704: }

1706: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
1707:   env: Env,
1708:   workspaceId: string,
1709:   deploymentId: string,
1710:   maxCycles = 8
1711: ): Promise<void> {
1712:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1713:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1714:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
1715:       return false;
1716:     }
1717: 
1718:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1719:       return false;
1720:     }
1721: 
1722:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
1723:       return false;
1724:     }
1725: 
1726:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1727:       workspaceId,
1728:       startedAt: null,
1729:       finishedAt: null,
1730:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1731:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
1732:     });
1733:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1734:       workspaceId,
1735:       deploymentId,
1736:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1737:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
1738:     });
1739:     return true;
1740:   }
1741: 
1742:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1743:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
1744:     try {
1745:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1746:     } catch (error) {
1747:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
1748:         return;
1749:       }
1750: 
1751:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
1752:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
1753:         try {
1754:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
1755:           if (recovered) {
1756:             continue;
1757:           }
1758:         } catch {
1759:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
1760:         }
1761:       }
1762:     }
1763: 
1764:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1765:     if (!latest) {
1766:       return;
1767:     }
1768:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1769:       return;
1770:     }
1771:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
1772:       continue;
1773:     }
1774:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
1775:       return;
1776:     }
1777:   }
1778: }
1779: 
1780: export async function cancelWorkspaceDeployment(
1781:   env: Env,
1782:   workspaceId: string,
1783:   deploymentId: string
1784: ): Promise<{ updated: boolean; deployment: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getWorkspaceDeployment>> }> {
1785:   const result = await requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1786:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'cancelled') {
1787:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1788:       workspaceId,
1789:       deploymentId,

state.title: packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.test.ts

parts.text:
Found one blocking issue.

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1617` / `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1658` — in the retry-path cancel branch, when provider cancel is **accepted**, the code clears `cancel_requested_at` and then still re-queues the deployment (`status='queued'` with `retry_scheduled`). That drops the user’s cancel intent and allows a new deployment attempt to start, even though the provider acknowledged cancellation for the in-flight one. This is a correctness blocker for the accepted-cancel path (not just a state-label issue).
